payload.answer: Stored the article URL reference and the stated reason, but not the article content because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so only the explicit URL reference and user-provided reason can be stored.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember the article at https://example.com/missing because it is useful for memory architecture.

details: Committed only the explicitly provided URL and reason.
Did not infer or store any article content because the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.

repair_options: Provide a different accessible URL for the article.
